name: rerank_documents
description: Reorder a list of documents by semantic relevance to a search query. Returns relevance scores and rankings, making it ideal for improving search results and RAG pipeline retrieval quality.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The reranking model ID to use.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query to rank documents against.

parameters.name: documents
parameters.description: Array of document strings to rank (max 1000 recommended).

parameters.name: top_n
parameters.description: Limit the number of results returned to the top N most relevant.

parameters.name: max_tokens_per_doc
parameters.description: Maximum tokens per document before truncation (default 4096).

documents: Quantum computing uses qubits to perform calculations.
The weather forecast predicts rain tomorrow.
